example: You have to collect things.

example: When I was a teenager, I was very shy.
example_zh: 當我是青少年時，我非常害羞。

example: Lena doesn't want to go hiking with John.
example_zh: 莉娜不想和約翰去健行。

example: Lena doesn't want to go sailing with John because she is afraid of water.
example_zh: 莉娜不想和約翰去航海，因為她怕水。

example: I like my coffee medium sweet.
example_zh: 我喜歡我的咖啡中等甜度。

example: The carpenter used his tools to build a chair.
example_zh: 木匠用他的工具製作椅子。

example: My keys have been in my pocket the whole time.
example_zh: 我的鑰匙一直都在我口袋裡。

example: I feel like a fool.
example_zh: 我覺得自己像個笨蛋。

example: Some people believe in ghosts.
example_zh: 有些人相信有鬼。

example: Don't talk to strangers.
example_zh: 不要和陌生人說話。

example: One daughter is in elementary school.
example_zh: 一個女兒讀小學。

example: I want to visit my aunt abroad.
example_zh: 我想去國外看望我的阿姨。

example: There will be greater basketball players than Stephen Curry.
example_zh: 將來會有比史蒂芬·柯瑞更偉大的籃球員。

example: Perhaps we should leave now.
example_zh: 也許我們現在應該走了。

example: I guess the rainwater has come in from the kitchen.
example_zh: 我猜雨水是從廚房進來的。

example: They were not used on strawberry farms until several years ago.
example_zh: 它們直到幾年前才在草莓農場使用。

example: There are online videos that teach you exercises.
example_zh: 有些線上影片教你做運動。

example: Jane's parents are always happy to see their grandchildren.
example_zh: 珍的父母總是很高興看到他們的孫子女。

example: Tell Daphne you broke her favorite cup.
example_zh: 你應該告訴達芙妮你打破了她最喜歡的杯子。

example: It was very windy this morning.
example_zh: 今天早上風很大。

example: Rex is a dog that lives at the bakery next to our school.
example_zh: 雷克斯是一隻住在我們學校旁邊麵包店的狗。

example: Rex is cute and friendly.
example_zh: 雷克斯很可愛又友善。

example: I was surprised that Rex was not there.
example_zh: 我很驚訝雷克斯不在那裡。

example: Rex became healthier and stronger.
example_zh: 雷克斯變得更健康、更強壯了。

example: He is now as handsome and strong as before!
example_zh: 牠現在和以前一樣英俊強壯！

example: Taking him to see a doctor.
example_zh: 帶牠去看醫生。

example: I'm getting married next year!
example_zh: 我明年要結婚了！

example: You're stealing Jenny's thunder.
example_zh: 你在搶珍妮的鋒頭。

example: All right, all right, my problem.
example_zh: 好吧，好吧，是我的問題。

example: Alisa doesn't like the restaurant we chose.
example_zh: 艾莉莎也不喜歡我們選的餐廳。

example: You can visit the city by metro, bus, or train.
example_zh: 你可以搭乘地鐵、公車或火車參觀這座城市。

example: The Weekend Card is for trips on weekends and holidays.
example_zh: 週末卡用於週末和假日旅行。

example: The Weekend Card is for trips on weekends and holidays.
example_zh: 週末卡用於週末和假日旅行。

example: Check the map for the zones you'll be entering.
example_zh: 查看地圖，了解你將進入的區域。

example: White Lake Airport is busy today.
example_zh: 白湖機場今天很繁忙。

example: Which choice will cost her the least?
example_zh: 哪一個選擇對她來說花費最少？

example: She mops the floor every morning.
example_zh: 她每天早上拖地。

example: She gets the mail and the newspapers.
example_zh: 她取郵件和報紙。

example: Rolling Acres used to be just a sheep farm.
example_zh: 羅林斯莊園以前只是一個綿羊農場。

example: Visitors can pick fruits.
example_zh: 遊客可以採摘水果。

example: It has fruit trees and vegetable gardens.
example_zh: 它有果樹和菜園。

example: It has vegetable gardens.
example_zh: 它有菜園。

example: Working at a family business also means making sacrifices.
example_zh: 在家族企業工作也意味著做出犧牲。

example: You feel closer to each other.
example_zh: 你們感覺彼此更親近。

example: Rolling Acres is not a zoo.
example_zh: 羅林斯莊園不是動物園。

example: Learning to use money wisely.
example_zh: 學習明智地使用金錢。

example: Making excuses for failing.
example_zh: 為失敗找藉口。

example: People came to Easter Island.
example_zh: 人們來到復活節島。

example: They loved making statues with big rocks.
example_zh: 他們喜歡用大石頭製作雕像。

example: They could move the statues around easily.
example_zh: 他們可以輕易地移動雕像。

example: Without enough trees, the land became dry.
example_zh: 沒有足夠的樹木，土地變得乾燥。

example: The land became dry.
example_zh: 土地變得乾燥。

example: The land became dry.
example_zh: 土地變得乾燥。

example: I'm thirsty.
example_zh: 我口渴了。

example: And I'm hungry.
example_zh: 我餓了。

example: The last trees were probably cut down at this time.
example_zh: 最後的樹木大概是在這個時候被砍伐的。

example: Those who cut down the last trees surely understood how important trees were.
example_zh: 那些砍伐最後樹木的人肯定明白樹木有多重要。

example: Ariely called it "the IKEA effect."
example_zh: 艾瑞利稱之為「IKEA效應」。

example: Dan Ariely bought a cabinet from IKEA.
example_zh: 丹·艾瑞利從IKEA買了一個櫃子。

example: IKEA is a famous furniture store.
example_zh: IKEA是一家著名的家具店。

example: People have to put all the parts together themselves.
example_zh: 人們必須自己將所有零件組裝起來。

example: Ariely didn't really enjoy himself when building.
example_zh: 艾瑞利在組裝時並沒有真正享受其中。

example: He felt quite good about himself.
example_zh: 他對自己感覺相當良好。

example: Ariely did a fun origami study.
example_zh: 艾瑞利做了一個有趣的摺紙研究。

example: He called one group "builders".
example_zh: 他稱其中一組為「組裝者」。

example: He called the other group "buyers".
example_zh: 他稱另一組為「買家」。

example: Builders were told to make paper frogs.
example_zh: 「組裝者」被告知製作紙青蛙。

example: Buyers would pay only five cents for origami.
example_zh: 買家只願為摺紙支付五分錢。

example: Interestingly, builders believed their works were good enough.
example_zh: 有趣的是，「組裝者」相信他們的作品夠好。

example: We love things more, sometimes blindly, when we make them ourselves.
example_zh: 當我們自己製作東西時，有時我們會盲目地更愛它們。

example: There is always a lot of shouting and crying.
example_zh: 總是有很多大喊大叫。

example: There is always a lot of shouting and crying.
example_zh: 總是有很多哭泣。

example: Give Mia her favorite candy.
example_zh: 給蜜雅她最喜歡的糖果。

example: In the picture is a UK electricity worker.
example_zh: 圖中是英國的電力工人。

example: Electricity workers asked to be paid more.
example_zh: 電力工人要求加薪。

example: They decided to stop working until their wish was answered.
example_zh: 他們決定罷工，直到他們的願望得到回應。

example: Their wish was answered.
example_zh: 他們的願望得到了回應。

example: The government worried that there wouldn't be enough electricity.
example_zh: 政府擔心電力不足。

example: The government agreed to give them the pay rise.
example_zh: 政府同意給他們加薪。

example: They worked shorter hours.
example_zh: 他們工作時間縮短了。

example: They acted like they would walk away from their job.
example_zh: 他們表現得好像會辭職。

example: They acted like they would walk away from their job anytime.
example_zh: 他們表現得好像隨時都會辭職。

example: The government made new rules for people to follow.
example_zh: 政府為人們制定了新的規定。

example: Each family could turn on the heat in only one room.
example_zh: 每個家庭只能在一個房間裡開暖氣。

example: People's lives were greatly changed.
example_zh: 人們的生活大大改變了。

example: People covered themselves in blankets.
example_zh: 人們用毯子把自己蓋住。

example: People covered themselves in blankets all the time.
example_zh: 人們一直用毯子把自己蓋住。

example: Hospitals had to use candles.
example_zh: 醫院不得不使用蠟燭。

example: During the "dark" time.
example_zh: 在這個「黑暗」的時期。

example: They were not brave enough to fix their problems.
example_zh: 他們不夠勇敢去解決他們的問題。

example: Most kids want gifts from their parents.
example_zh: 大多數孩子都想要父母的禮物。

example: He started this in his first year of junior high school.
example_zh: 他從國中一年級開始這樣做。

example: He watched a video about how a baby is born.
example_zh: 他看了一部關於嬰兒如何出生的影片。

example: He held his mom in his arms for a long time.
example_zh: 他抱著媽媽很久。

example: His mom was doing all the hard work.
example_zh: 他的媽媽在做所有的辛苦工作。

example: The cookies tasted so bad.
example_zh: 這些餅乾嚐起來很難吃。

example: He makes a gift for his mother to thank her.
example_zh: 他為媽媽準備禮物來感謝她。

example: Cameron is going to give his mom a nice dress.
example_zh: 卡麥隆打算送他媽媽一件漂亮的洋裝。

example: The dress is hanging behind Cameron's bedroom door.
example_zh: 這件洋裝掛在卡麥隆臥室門後。

example: The dress is hanging behind Cameron's bedroom door.
example_zh: 這件洋裝掛在卡麥隆臥室門後。

example: The experience made him change his mind.
example_zh: 這個經驗讓他改變了心意。
